name: Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pie filling and milk in a saucepan.
2. Add butter and chocolate to the mixture.
3. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture comes to a full rolling boil.
4. Remove from heat and let cool for 5 minutes, stirring twice.
5. Pour into the cooled pie shell and chill for 3 hours.
6. Garnish with whipped topping and chocolate curls if desired.
Note: Plastic wrap may be placed on the surface of the pie filling before chilling.
